titleStmt.title: SII 22.76: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 76. (A.R. No. 76 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. KONĒRINMAIKOṆḌĀṈ (?) 17th YEAR.

summary.p: This records an endowment of the village Śīpādanallūr inclusive of the lands on permanent tenure as iṟai-yili (tax-free) to the temple of Tāntōṉṟi-Āḷuḍaiya-Nāyaṉār at Śaṇbai in Śeṅkuṉṟa-nāḍu a division of Vāṇagōppāḍi on the northern bank, to meet the expenses of the service called the “Bhuvanēkavīraṉ-śandi” and for repairs to the temple by two persons by name Bhārgavaṉ Ūrbāgaṅkoṇḍāṉ and Kauśikaṉ Yajñamūrtti of Iṟaivāṉaraiyūr in Narippaḷḷi-nāḍu on the northern bank, a division of Magadaimaṇḍalam. “Bhuvanēkavīra” is known to have been a title of Māṟavarman Kulaśēkhara I. (A.R. No. 260 of 1917).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirupuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ peṇṇai vaṭakarai vāṇakoppāṭi ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭu caṇpai Uṭaiyār tiruttāntoṉṟi Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilttāṉattāṟkku makataimaṇṭalam vaṭakarai narippaḷḷi nāṭṭu Iṟaivāṉaraiyūr bhārggavaṉ Ūrpākaṅkoṇṭārum kauśikaṉ yajñamutti yum kāṇiāṉa cipātanallūr kiḻpāṟkellai kuṇamaṅkalattu Ellaikku meṟkku teṉpāṟkellai
cempiyaṉ mātevi Arumpuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭu Ellaikku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai tammaṭṭapaṭṭu Ellaikku kiḻakku peṇṇaiyāṟṟukku teṟkum Āka ṉāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nilaṅkaḷum nattamu muṟṟum puvaṉekaviraṉ cantikkum tiruppaṇikkum kuṭiniṅkā tevatāṉa mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyākap patiṉeḻāvatu Āṭimātamutal Utaka pūrvvamāka candrādityavaraiyum cella mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka tantom tiru veḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.76 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
